embeds.title: How Live Service Game Teams Track A Game's Health
embeds.description:
When talking about why they think something is doing well, people tend to focus on sales and download numbers but contrary to what one might believe, these numbers on their own can be flawed if used in isolation.

This is especially the case with gacha games like Fate Grand Order, Genshin, Nikke or
